user.title: OpenVPN Manager Setup
user.description: Before continuing: Install and start the OpenVPN Manager add-on. Make sure it's running. After this setup, you'll need to upload your .ovpn file.

upload.title: Upload VPN Configuration
upload.description: Upload your .ovpn file via: 1) Add-on Files tab or 2) Terminal using curl command. See documentation for detailed instructions. After uploading, toggle the VPN switch in your dashboard.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to OpenVPN Manager add-on. Verify: add-on is running, host and port are correct, check add-on logs for errors.
